_meta.title: FEED/agent-activity component family — design INTAKE (scope ruling + first records; no build)
_meta.author: planner (design seat)
_meta.grounding: the artifact-feed forcing evidence (document-row seed hand-composes an attachment card from Icon+Text, catalog-coverage.ts:184-235; A2A TaskState working/input-required has no visual, a2a/src/protocol/task-state.ts; NO transient notification surface in the fleet) · ADR-0107 + chart-family PRD (the intake shape cloned) · ADR-0102 (three-lane chooser) · ADR-0087 (catalog-or-allowlist gate) · ADR-0097 + Amendment (TOTAL feed partition) · ADR-0043/0045 (overlay platform + dismissal) · ADR-0041 (widget geometry) · ADR-0065 cl.4 (ui-icon decorative default) · references/geometry.md (five size-classes; progress already enumerated Display-class) · a2a types.ts:55-74 (FilePart) · slider.css:76-79 (rail refuses box derivation) · bar-chart.css:101-107 (forced-colors lesson)
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently: OUTSIDE-IN structure from the intake record family (family scope ruling -> per-component contract directions -> ecosystem dispositions -> records -> gates/handback); INSIDE-OUT actions from the dispatch's design questions (progress value model, avatar fallback/sizing, attachment posture/href, toast architecture/ownership) + the standing doctrine set (zero-dep, geometry law, ADR-0087 gate, ADR-0097 partition, ADR-0102 lanes, handoff contract).

nodes.label: v1 family scope ruling (four components in + the ruled-out set, reasons from mechanics)
nodes.accept: the PRD scope section names the four v1 components AND the ruled-out list with a per-item reason; harness_checks.py prd P3 (out-of-scope stated) passes as part of exit 0

nodes.label: per-component contract directions (the ADR records direction; SPEC/LLD own mechanism at build)
ui-progress direction (value model + a11y + WHCM + geometry + TaskState guidance boundary)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 Decision states ui-progress's determinate/indeterminate model (value/max), the internals a11y contract (role=progressbar + valuenow/valuetext), the forced-colors direction (the bar-chart lesson cited), the Display-class rail geometry with a min-inline-size floor, and the TaskState pairing as guidance-only with NO a2a import

nodes.label: ui-avatar direction (fallback chain + a11y default + identity-color stance + sizing lever)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 Decision states the src -> initials -> glyph fallback chain, the decorative-by-default stance argued against ADR-0065 cl.4 (holds, unlike the chart inversion), the no-hue-identity v1 ruling grounded in the CVD/AA law, and a sizing-lever fork carrying a firm recommendation

nodes.label: ui-attachment direction (FilePart-aligned props + glyph derivation + posture + href-by-reference)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 Decision states the FilePart-aligned prop set (name/mimeType/size/href, size named as NOT a wire field), the mimeType->category glyph pure-module direction, a posture fork (card vs list-item) with a firm recommendation, and the href/link-security constraint coordinated BY REFERENCE to the sibling ADR-0114 (named as a cross-family ordering constraint, not designed here)

nodes.label: ui-toast direction (surface architecture + ownership/API + a11y + timing)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 Decision states the toast surface architecture and ownership/API model as Kim forks with firm recommendations, plus the a11y contract (role=status default, urgent opt-in to alert, never focus-stealing — ADR-0020 adjacency cited) and the auto-dismiss/pause-on-hover-and-focus/actionable-persistence timing rules

nodes.label: catalog + Gen-UI teaching disposition (ADR-0087 compliance path: rows AND allowlist arm)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 states same-wave catalog rows for Progress/Avatar/Attachment (display-only, no ADR-0019 value mark) AND the Toast/ToastRegion allowlist-OUT entries with recorded reasons (the ADR-0087 gate's other arm), plus the section 5.2 usage-guidance and exemplar-upgrade items

nodes.label: feed-partition dispositions (ADR-0097 TOTAL partition, every new catalog type owes one)
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 records an ADR-0097 partition disposition for every NEW catalog type (each IN or OUT with a reason) and states explicitly that non-catalog types owe none

nodes.label: packaging ruling + size-budget stance
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 records the no-new-package ruling (ordinary controls folders, pure modules in-folder — the ADR-0107 cl.7 pattern) and the anticipated family-budget re-base measured at the build wave (npm run size, manual per ADR-0040 section 3), never guessed in the intake

nodes.label: cross-package / cross-family build dependencies
nodes.accept: ADR-0112 names the @agent-ui/icons vendor-wave dependency (the 11-name MVP has no file/document/user glyph — icons/src/types.ts:4-8; the document-row seed's silent-empty-glyph defect cited) and the ADR-0114 ordering constraint, each with an owner

nodes.label: PRD sibling-vs-extension ruling + the compact PRD (.claude/docs/prd/feed-family.prd.md)
nodes.accept: the PRD file exists under .claude/docs/prd/ with stable PRD-G IDs, metric+baseline+target+timeframe per goal, both-sided scope, priority tiers, and the sibling-vs-extension ruling stated in its header; python harness_checks.py prd <path> exits 0

nodes.label: scoping ADR-0112 (proposed; Kim forks with firm recommendations)
nodes.accept: 0112-feed-family-v1-scope.md exists under .claude/docs/adr/ with Status: proposed (never self-flipped — a hook enforces), non-empty Repairs, all four required sections + Acceptance, and >=3 named Kim forks each carrying a firm recommendation; python adr_check.py <path> exits 0

nodes.label: index row (adr/README.md)
nodes.accept: adr/README.md index table carries a 0112 row (title + status + repairs), appended only after re-reading the file tail (concurrent siblings own 0111/0113/0114); adr_check C6 (indexed) passes

nodes.label: mechanical gates run to green
nodes.accept: coverage_check.py --strict exits 0 on this manifest AND harness_checks.py prd exits 0 AND adr_check.py exits 0, all actually run this session with output read (never eyeballed)

nodes.label: design-status handback (handoff-compose contract)
nodes.accept: the final handback carries the eight handoff-compose fields in order, Status on line 1, gate verdicts by command, and names doc-reviewer as the ratifying critic

actions.label: decide which activity-vocabulary components earn v1 and which adjacent shapes are ruled out, argued from mechanics
decide ui-progress's determinate/indeterminate value model, announcement contract, forced-colors survival, and rail geometry
decide ui-avatar's fallback chain, decorative-vs-named default, identity-color stance, and sizing lever
decide ui-attachment's wire-aligned prop set, glyph derivation, display posture, and how link security is coordinated without designing it
decide ui-toast's top-layer strategy, region ownership + show API, announcement roles, and dismissal timing rules
disposition every new descriptor under the ADR-0087 catalog-or-allowlist gate + name the teaching artifacts
disposition every new catalog type against the ADR-0097 ask-feed partition
rule packaging and anticipate the size-budget re-base honestly
name the cross-package (icons) and cross-family (ADR-0114) dependencies the build wave inherits
rule PRD-extension-vs-sibling and author the compact PRD with gated goals
record the scope decision as a proposed ADR at the reserved number 0112, naming the genuine Kim forks
index the new record so every citation resolves, without clobbering concurrent siblings
run the mechanical doc gates and fix to green
compose the handback naming the reviewer seat

edges.why: the PRD's scope section pins the v1-in/out ruling — it cannot be authored before the ruling exists
ADR-0112's Decision clause 1 records the family-set ruling
the ADR records the progress contract direction; deciding it is prerequisite content
the ADR records the avatar contract direction; deciding it is prerequisite content
the ADR records the attachment contract direction; deciding it is prerequisite content
the ADR records the toast contract direction; deciding it is prerequisite content
the catalog/allowlist + teaching disposition is ADR Decision content
the feed-partition dispositions are ADR Decision content
the packaging/size ruling is ADR Decision/Consequences content
the named dependencies are ADR Consequences content the build wave consumes
the ADR's Repairs field pins the PRD and its clauses cite PRD-G IDs — the PRD must exist first
the index row cites the ADR's number + title
the PRD gate runs over the authored PRD
the ADR gate runs over the authored ADR
adr_check C6 asserts the README index row exists — the gate can only pass after indexing
the handback reports gate verdicts by command — the gates must have run first
